title: bohay: mission control for your AI coding agents
excerpt: Mission control for your AI coding agents. Run, watch, resume, and orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, opencode and more from one terminal, with a live view of every agent.
content_html:
Next-Gen mission control
for your AI agents

One place to run, watch, resume, and orchestrate every coding agent.

curl -fsSL https://bohay.dev/install.sh | sh

or brew install RizRiyz/bohay/bohay · cargo install bohay · Windows & more

bohay · sudos ● live demo · click around

+

claude · ~/sudos

codex · ~/sudos

⌃Space prefix · copilot is blocked · click its pane to approve

Everything your agents need, in one place

One terminal that watches every agent, keeps your work safe, and ships your code without switching windows.

◉

See every agent at a glance

One sidebar shows what each agent is doing right now: waiting on you, working, finished, or resting. Status you can trust, too: an agent only counts as working when it really is, so a starting CLI or your own typing never reads as busy. An optional retro chime tells you the moment one finishes or needs you.

See the agent view

⌘

See what an agent is really running

Agents shorten long commands on screen. Click a pane's title for the real one, in full, straight from the system.

Inspect a pane

∞

Pick up where you left off

Close the terminal and nothing stops. Open it again and every pane, tab, and layout is right where you left it.

How sessions work

■

Read the files your agents touch

A file tree in the sidebar, tinted by git status so you see what changed at a glance. Click a file to read it in a fast built in viewer that updates itself as an agent edits, or open it straight in vim, nano, or whatever your editor is.

Browse and open files

◇

Run a whole team at once

Put many agents on one project together without stepping on each other. Every agent works in its own copy, claims the files it touches, and only merges once your tests pass.

Meet the task board

↺

Your agents remember too

After a restart, each agent reloads its own chat history by itself. You never paste a session flag or lose the thread.

About resume

⎇

Git without leaving

Browse commits, branches, pull requests, and issues in a built in tab. Open a pull request or merge it right there, without touching another app.

Explore the git tab

⇄

Work on any machine

Drive a session running on another computer straight from your laptop over plain SSH. No port forwarding to set up, and it still feels instant as you type.

Set up remote

Several agents. One repo.
Zero conflicts.

Add tasks with dependencies to the ◇ orch board. Each started task gets an isolated git worktree and its own pane; path leases stop overlapping edits from even being assigned; a quality gate (your test command) must pass before a task counts as done; and finished branches merge through a dedicated worktree,your checkout is never touched.

Read the orchestration guide →

Your agent team, in the notch

bohay-notch mirrors every agent into a native macOS panel that drops from the MacBook notch. Monitor them, approve a request or answer a question, and jump straight to any pane, all without breaking flow.

claude · ~/sudos

Agents

4

AGENTS4

2 running 1 done 1 idle $3.99total

brew install --cask --no-quarantine RizRiyz/bohay/bohay-notch macOS 15+ · Apple silicon · or download the .dmg

Works with the agents you already use

Claude Code

Copilot

Codex

opencode

Cursor

Pi

Kimi

Amp

Grok

Qwen

…plus Gemini, Aider, Droid, and any agent bohay recognizes on screen. Live status for all, zero setup. The ● agents also resume your sessions after a restart, and most report precise events through the optional hook. Full matrix →

Open source · AGPL-3.0 licensed

If bohay saves you time, give it a star

bohay is free and fully open source. A star helps more people running AI agents find it, and you are welcome to read the code, open an issue, or send a pull request any time.

Star on GitHub Browse the code

sentences.en: A file tree in the sidebar, tinted by git status so you see what changed at a glance.

blocks.html_en: Put many agents on one project together without stepping on each other. Every agent works in its own copy, claims the files it touches, and only merges once your tests pass.

sentences.en: Put many agents on one project together without stepping on each other.
sentences.zh: 将多个代理放在一个项目上，而不互相影响。

sentences.en: Every agent works in its own copy, claims the files it touches, and only merges once your tests pass.
sentences.zh: 每个代理都在自己的副本中工作，声明其接触的文件，并且只有在测试通过后才会合并。

blocks.html_en: Your agents remember too

sentences.en: Your agents remember too
sentences.zh: 您的经纪人也记得

sentences.zh: 重新启动后，每个代理都会自行重新加载自己的聊天记录。

sentences.en: You never paste a session flag or lose the thread.
sentences.zh: 您永远不会粘贴会话标志或丢失线程。

blocks.html_en: Browse commits, branches, pull requests, and issues in a built in tab. Open a pull request or merge it right there, without touching another app.

sentences.en: Browse commits, branches, pull requests, and issues in a built in tab.
sentences.zh: 在内置选项卡中浏览提交、分支、拉取请求和问题。

sentences.en: Open a pull request or merge it right there, without touching another app.
sentences.zh: 打开拉取请求或直接合并它，而无需接触其他应用程序。

blocks.html_en: Work on any machine

sentences.en: Work on any machine
sentences.zh: 在任何机器上工作

blocks.html_en: Drive a session running on another computer straight from your laptop over plain SSH. No port forwarding to set up, and it still feels instant as you type.

sentences.en: Drive a session running on another computer straight from your laptop over plain SSH.
sentences.zh: 通过普通 SSH 直接从您的笔记本电脑驱动在另一台计算机上运行的会话。

sentences.en: No port forwarding to set up, and it still feels instant as you type.
sentences.zh: 无需设置端口转发，并且在您键入时仍然感觉即时。

blocks.html_en:
Several agents. One repo.
Zero conflicts.

sentences.zh: 几个代理。

sentences.en: One repo.Zero conflicts.
sentences.zh: 一个仓库，零冲突。

blocks.html_en: Add tasks with dependencies to the ◇ orch board. Each started task gets an isolated git worktree and its own pane; path leases stop overlapping edits from even being assigned; a quality gate (your test command) must pass before a task counts as done; and finished branches merge through a dedicated worktree,your checkout is never touched.

sentences.en: Add tasks with dependencies to the ◇ orch board.
sentences.zh: ◇ 将具有依赖关系的任务添加到 orch board。

sentences.en: Each started task gets an isolated git worktree and its own pane; path leases stop overlapping edits from even being assigned; a quality gate (your test command) must pass before a task counts as done; and finished branches merge through a dedicated worktree,your checkout is never touched.
sentences.zh: 每个启动的任务都有一个独立的 git 工作树和它自己的窗格；路径租约甚至可以阻止重叠编辑的分配；在任务算作完成之前，必须通过质量门（您的测试命令）；完成的分支通过专用的工作树合并，您的结账永远不会被触及。

content_html_zh:
适用于您的人工智能代理的下一代任务控制

一个可以运行、监视、恢复和编排每个编码代理的地方。

卷曲-fsSL https://bohay.dev/install.sh |嘘

或brew install RizRiyz/bohay/bohay·cargo install bohay·Windows及更多

bohay · sudos ● 现场演示 · 点击周围

+

克劳德·~/sudos

法典·~/sudos

⌃空格前缀·副驾驶被屏蔽·点击其窗格进行批准

您的代理所需的一切都集中在一处

一个终端可以监视每个代理，保证您的工作安全，并且无需切换窗口即可传送您的代码。

◉

每个代理一目了然

一个侧边栏显示每个代理现在正在做什么：等待您、工作、完成或休息。 您也可以信任的状态：代理只有在实际工作时才算作工作，因此启动 CLI 或您自己的键入永远不会显示为忙碌。 可选的复古铃声会告诉您某人完成或需要您的时刻。

See the agent view

⌘

查看代理实际运行的内容

代理缩短屏幕上的长命令。 单击窗格的标题即可直接从系统获取完整的真实窗格标题。

Inspect a pane

∞

从上次停下的地方继续

关闭终端，一切都停止了。 再次打开它，每个窗格、选项卡和布局都位于您离开的位置。

How sessions work

■

读取您的特工接触的文件

侧边栏中的文件树，由 git status 着色，以便您一目了然地看到发生了什么变化。 单击文件即可在快速内置查看器中读取它，该查看器会在代理编辑时自行更新，或者直接在 vim、nano 或任何编辑器中打开它。

Browse and open files

◇

一次性管理整个团队

将多个代理放在一个项目上，而不互相影响。 每个代理都在自己的副本中工作，声明其接触的文件，并且只有在测试通过后才会合并。

Meet the task board

↺

您的经纪人也记得

重新启动后，每个代理都会自行重新加载自己的聊天记录。 您永远不会粘贴会话标志或丢失线程。

About resume

⎇

Git 无需离开

在内置选项卡中浏览提交、分支、拉取请求和问题。 打开拉取请求或直接合并它，而无需接触其他应用程序。

Explore the git tab

⇄

在任何机器上工作

通过普通 SSH 直接从您的笔记本电脑驱动在另一台计算机上运行的会话。 无需设置端口转发，并且在您键入时仍然感觉即时。

Set up remote

几个代理。 一个仓库，零冲突。

◇ 将具有依赖关系的任务添加到 orch board。 每个启动的任务都有一个独立的 git 工作树和它自己的窗格；路径租约甚至可以阻止重叠编辑的分配；在任务算作完成之前，必须通过质量门（您的测试命令）；完成的分支通过专用的工作树合并，您的结账永远不会被触及。

您的代理团队处于领先地位
